parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: The active state of the node/block. When active, the node will actively render the block. If disabled, the node will release its instance of the block, and unload it if there are no other instances (i

parameters.name: clearparams
parameters.label: Clear Parameter Values on File Change
parameters.description: When enabled, all parameters will be cleared. When disabled, it will keep parameter values for exposed parameters of the same name when the Notch Block file changes.

parameters.name: layer
parameters.label: Layer
parameters.description: The layer used as the output to the Notch .

parameters.name: playmode
parameters.label: Play Mode
parameters.description: A menu to specify the method used for playback of the block.

parameters.name: init
parameters.label: Initialize
parameters.description: Initialize the playback of the block. This will reset it to the start, but not move forward with playback.

parameters.name: start
parameters.label: Start
parameters.description: Start the playback of the block. This will reset it to the start and begin playback.

parameters.name: play
parameters.label: Play
parameters.description: Enable playback of the block. When disabled and in Sequential mode the playback will be paused.

parameters.name: index
parameters.label: Index
parameters.description: The index of the playback when Index mode is selected.

parameters.name: indexunit
parameters.label: Index Unit
parameters.description: Sets the units used in the Index parameter.

parameters.name: purge
parameters.label: Purge GPU Mem
parameters.description: Purge Video RAM used by the block.
